subcodes.first_line: The Remembrance calleth out from the most exalted station, speaking and saying: "Praise be unto Thee, O Lord of the worlds, inasmuch as Thou hast manifested..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الذکر ینادی من اعلی المقام ینطق و یقول لک الحمد یا اله العالمین بما اظهرت
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
